findings.title: Out-of-scope implementation changes for gap-run feature
findings.description: The diff from `feat/int-run..HEAD` changes runtime behavior in `internal/watchdog/*` and `internal/version/*`, but this task's scope is post-build gap analysis output for feature `run`. These code changes are outside the declared scope and violate the feature contract.
findings.suggested_fix: Revert non-scope code changes and implement only the required gap-analysis deliverable files for `swarm/features/run`.

findings.title: Required deliverable is missing
findings.description: The mandatory artifact `swarm/features/run/gap-report.md` does not exist, so the feature objective output is incomplete.
findings.suggested_fix: Create `swarm/features/run/gap-report.md` with confirmed complete items, identified gaps (with severity and rationale), and concrete follow-up tickets.

findings.title: Modified file exceeds 800-line limit
findings.description: `internal/watchdog/watchdog.go` was modified and is 2571 lines long, violating the review rule that no file should exceed 800 lines.
findings.suggested_fix: Refactor watchdog responsibilities into smaller focused modules and move new logic into a dedicated file under 800 lines.

findings.title: Modified test file exceeds 800-line limit
findings.description: `internal/watchdog/watchdog_test.go` was modified and is 1465 lines long, violating the 800-line file-size constraint.
findings.suggested_fix: Split tests into feature-focused files (for example: post-build generation, retry behavior, routing) and keep each file below 800 lines.
